description: A patriotic slogan graphic with a warm, nostalgic, film-grain aesthetic. The photograph shows a large American flag waving on a pole at center, backlit by a soft pink-and-lavender dusk sky, with a range of blue mountains catching golden sunset light along the lower portion of the frame. A subtle grain/vignette gives it a vintage 'analog film' look popular in MAGA-adjacent social aesthetics. Centered across the top in elegant white serif typography is the two-line slogan 'America First.' (upright) and 'Americans First.' (italic), with a tiny faint circular DOL/government seal watermark just above. There is no other text. The technique is pure emotional/patriotic branding: pairing iconic flag-and-mountain imagery with the nationalist 'America First / Americans First' slogan to frame the administration's labor and immigration agenda (per the tweet: employment gains to American-born workers, cracking down on H-1B 'abuse'). Target audience: nationalist/patriotic supporters and the general public.
